creator: s.a.boggis@qmul.ac.uk
text:
The existing version of freeipmi in the ports collection (0.1.3) does not
properly support configuration of the local baseboard management controller
over the /dev/io interface (so-called in-band access).  Specifically,
whilst it supports our older Intel WV2 serverboards completely, it cannot
configure the newer Intel JR2 serverboard.
The updated version (0.2.3) solves this problem.

How-To-Repeat: n/a
